body.composite_hash_field: checkpoint.composite_hash must be a string starting with sha256:

head_validation.head: each value must be an object
head_validation.sequence_number: must satisfy Python isinstance(value, int); bool is not excluded by current verifier
head_validation.last_record_hash: must be a string; no hex/prefix validation

algorithm.sort: sort chain_heads keys lexicographically by Python sorted(keys)
algorithm.empty_input: sha256 of empty byte string with sha256: prefix

body.compare: recomputed composite hash must equal checkpoint.composite_hash exact string
